data.headline: Portfolio down 0.09% vs SPY up 0.05%; NVDA position underwater
data.summary: End-of-day portfolio equity: $999,118.21 (-0.09% return). Benchmark (SPY) returned +0.05%. Performance gap of -140.5 bps driven by single NVDA holding (398 shares at $211.15 mark, -$880.79 unrealized loss). Stock purchased at $213.36 avg cost basis. One trade executed today; cash position $915,080.52. Portfolio holds concentrated single-name risk in NVDA with no diversification.
data.risk_note: Concentrated NVDA position represents 8.4% of starting capital. Underwater position with negative alpha of -140.5 bps. Limited liquidity diversification; single holding exposes portfolio to idiosyncratic equity risk.
